author: aarishnaiyer
content: Hello everyone, I am Aarish. I'll be joining EPF Cohort 7 permissionlessly. I'll be exploring the Decentralized CL Checkpoint Sync project under Nimbus, mentored by Etan Kissling.This week, I have spent some time reading the light client sync protocol specification document and the checkpoint sync notes. I'm also learning Rust through The Rust Book and beginning to study Nim via the official Nim tutorial, given that Nimbus is written in it. Next, I'll be reaching out to Etan to identify a concrete starting point, and getting into the Nimbus codebase. I have posted my update here : https://hackmd.io/@KkIQfF7fRl6hdN__0PApfw/Syz-F0gzMg
